form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 320m at this track behind Florida Line beaten 3.5 lengths (18.59). Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.01) at this track in a NG, finishing fifth and beaten 5 lengths. Strong record off the draw with five wins and four minors from 12 starts. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together, ran wide and lost substantial momentum.
Midway down the home straight drew attention and raced inside.
